get.summary: List clips for a campaign (owner sees all, clipper sees own)
List my submitted clips across all campaigns (clipper only)
Get clip detail (clip owner or campaign owner only)

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by target platform (e.g. tiktok, youtube)

get.summary: Get escrow status for a campaign (owner only)

post.summary: Set verified views for a clip and release earnings (admin only for MVP)

get.summary: Get earnings summary for current clipper
List transactions for current user (both sent and received)

post.summary: Request a withdrawal (clipper only, minimum Rp 50.000)

get.summary: Get dispute detail (parties involved or admin only)

200.description: List of conversations with last message and unread count

get.summary: Get messages for a conversation (paginated, newest first)
List notifications for current user with unread count

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read

get.summary: List all users with optional role/kycStatus filter
List all campaigns with optional status filter

patch.summary: Perform an admin action on a user (ban/suspend/activate/verify_kyc)

sourceUrl.description: YouTube URL or RSS feed URL

ratePerKViews.description: Rate per 1K views in Rupiah (min Rp 1,000)

budgetTotal.description: Total campaign budget in Rupiah (min Rp 50,000)

sourceUrl.description: YouTube URL or RSS feed URL

ratePerKViews.description: Rate per 1K views in Rupiah (min Rp 1,000)

budgetTotal.description: Total campaign budget in Rupiah (min Rp 50,000)

postedUrl.description: TikTok/Reels/Shorts URL of the posted clip

platform.description: Platform where the clip was posted

action.description: Review action to take on the clip

feedback.description: Required for reject or revision actions

views.description: Verified view count for the clip

earned.description: Total completed payout earnings in IDR

pending.description: Sum of pending payout transactions in IDR

available.description: Available balance for withdrawal (earned - withdrawn) in IDR

withdrawn.description: Total amount already withdrawn in IDR

campaignId.description: Campaign ID involved in the dispute

clipId.description: Clip ID involved in the dispute
